question.label: The real version
question.name: Tell me about your week — the real version.
question.description: Kim Scott's 'care personally' made concrete. Signals that a performed answer won't cut it.

answer: its been a lot of delibreation and team people managing rather than progress from me, my todo list is just too big
note: Describes being overwhelmed by a large to-do list and lack of personal progress — indicative of stress and disengagement.
